cleavage agent: subjected to an in-gel digestion protocol using trypsin for LC–MS/MS analysis
fragmentation method: the resolution of the higher energy collisional dissociation spectra was set to 17,500
instrument: analyzed using a Dionex UltiMate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled to a Q Exactive instrument
ionization type: analyze peptides at an electrospray potential of 1.5 kV
labeling: Exponentially modified Protein Abundance Index (emPAI) was used for label-free protein quantification
